summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Clear skies, pleasant spring evening, 15°C.)
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 29): Markets closed for the weekend. AMZN steady at $199.34 (Mar 27 close); INTC at $43.13. Investors focus on upcoming fiscal outlook and sector stability. Key insights: AMZN AWS AI remains key growth driver; INTC focus on AI PC partnerships amidst 'Arrow Lake Refresh' volatility.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 29): Continued cautious optimism after March marquee auctions. Renewed interest in long-term stewardship; high-end blue-chip works remain resilient amidst broader geopolitical/economic recalibration.
